> **DRAFT — Integrated Core Solution quotation output templates, distilled from the ICS asset set (anonymised, generic). Customer not named. Review before external use.**

# Integrated Core Solution — Quotation Output Templates

The budgetary quotation has three parts: a pricing schedule, a solution description, and a statement of compliance. These are the output shapes the quotation should follow.

---

## 1. Pricing schedule template

Line-item indicative pricing, grouped. Present ranges, not point estimates, and show the commercial construct rather than a flat list-price discount.

| Group | Items | Basis |
|---|---|---|
| Core network functions | PCC, PCG, CCDM, CCSM, CCRC, CCPC, SC, vHSS, ETDP | Capacity-based licence (SAU and throughput), one-time and recurring |
| Supporting functions | EDA, EVNFM, NeLS, 5GC AS | Per solution |
| Cloud infrastructure | CNIS (CCD, Ceph hosted storage, CEE, SDI3 compact cloud) | Mandatory, included |
| Services | Solution design, deployment, integration, testing, acceptance, go-live | From the Effort Estimates for the defined work packages |
| Optional packages | 4G and 5G roaming, MCPTT, network slicing, external HSS | Scoped and priced separately |

Columns per line: Item, Component, Quantity or Capacity, One-time cost, Recurring cost, Currency. State the recommended construct: multi-year framework, software-attach incentive, capacity tiers, and rebate tied to deployment milestones. Indicative and non-binding, subject to detailed scope.

---

## 2. Solution description template

- Introduction, purpose, and requirement specification.
- Integrated Core Solution overview.
- Components: Dual-Mode 5G Core products, supporting functions, the CNIS platform, deployment options, and operation and maintenance.
- Solution work packages (standard and optional), tied to the customer's stated needs and capacity.
- Deployment options: single site (lab), geo-redundant 1+1, additional ICS site, integrated vHSS.
- Concise and indicative, not detailed design.

---

## 3. Statement of compliance template

Point-by-point response to each stated customer requirement.

| Requirement | Compliance | Solution element | Note |
|---|---|---|---|
| (customer requirement) | FULL / PARTIAL / OPTIONAL / NON-COMPLIANT | (which ICS element meets it) | (brief justification) |
